name: jobpilot-ai
description: Review-first AI job application assistant for web and mobile PWA demos.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=backend" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend" "npm run dev --workspace=admin-portal"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=admin-portal
scripts.desktop: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run start --workspace=desktop
scripts.check: npm run test && npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=admin-portal
